title: The Young Man and the Little Girl Meet
overview: The adventurer Dale Reki is undertaking fairly typical mission when he finds a young devil girl, with a broken horn. Not willing to abandon her in the wilderness, he takes her back to the town he works out of, to see if he can help her find her way.

title: The Little Girl Begins Her New Life
overview: While helping run errands in town, Latina gets lost and goes on a small adventure of her own, while Dale frantically searches for her.

title: The Young Man Heads Out
overview: A job has Dale traveling to the royal capital, which means leaving Latina at home for several days. Will either of them manage without each other?

title: The Little Girl and the 'Incident'
overview: Latina starts attending classes at the local temple, where she learns more about human society: for better, and for worse.

title: The Little Girl Is Fascinated by the Snow
overview: As snow begins to fall in Kreuz, Latina comes up with an secret plan involving Dale.

title: The Young Girl Leaves on a Journey
overview: Some unexpected news has Dale preparing to make the long trip back to his hometown, and Latina decides she wants to go with him.

title: The Young Girl Visits a Port Town
overview: Dale and Latina arrive in a port town where they encounter a musician that shares a secret with Latina.

title: The Young Man Arrives at His Home Village
overview: After visiting with Dale's cousin, he and Latina arrive in the village of Teathrow where they receive a spicy welcome.

title: The Young Man Attends His Brother's Wedding with the Young Girl
overview: On the night of his brother's wedding, Dale comes to terms with his position among the Teathrow, and the course of events that led him to meet Latina.

title: The Young Girl Returns to Kreuz
overview: Dale and Latina begin their return to Kreuz, and along the way, pick up some souvenirs for their friends back home.

title: The Young Girl and the Kitty Paradise
overview: Latina's made all kinds of friends since starting her life in Kreuz, but cats have managed to evade her so far. That changes when she and Dale are introduced to a trader from the east with a house full of furry friends.

title: The Young Girl's Wish
overview: Rita's baby is due soon, Latina's tenure at school is ending, and changes is in the air. What ill the future hold for the young devil girl and her guardian?
